eng: While reading the heart-warming message, the boy suddenly smiled.

dun: lalābat śuthart ba ñeɂāhai bhityai cami ledhisat layūvāhai.
mor: lalāba=t śuth0r=t ba ñeɂ-∅-∅-āhai bhity-ai cami ledhis-at le-∅-ū-āhai
eng: Between husband and wife, little attentions beget much love.
Keep your children's feet dry and warm.

dun: viṣmaih remyūvevu saṃlulyoṭu se dā pañjallevu.
mor: viṣ0m-aih remy-∅-ū-evu saṃluly-oṭu se dā pañjall-∅-∅-evu
eng: Help others and you're a hero too.
The eyes are blind. One must look with the heart.
I know who I want to take me home.

dun: nayiḫe sebāre yäyīsūva, līdade ālīce tabheltā yajajak nīyūnī.
mor: nayiḫ-e sebāre yäyīsū-∅-∅-a līdad-e ālīce tabhelt-ā yajaj-ak nī-∅-ū-(n)ī
gloss: sentence-<small>DIR.SG</small>. once_more. read.<small>NECESS-EXP-PAT-PRES.3SG.IND</small>. teacher-<small>DIR.SG</small>. thus.<small>DIST</small>. concern-<small>LOC.SG</small>. student-<small>DAT.SG</small>. say-<small>EXP-AG-PAST.3SG.IND</small>.
eng: The teacher, caringly, told the student to read the sentence once again.

dun: nayiḫat sebāre yēyū tati līdade tabheltā yajajak nīyūnī.
mor: nayiḫ-at sebāre yēy-∅-ū-∅ tati līdad-e tabhelt-ā yajaj-ak nī-∅-ū-(n)ī
gloss: sentence-<small>ACC.SG</small>. once_more. read.<small>IMP-EXP-AG-2SG</small>. <small>QUOT</small>. teacher-<small>DIR.SG</small>. concern-<small>LOC.SG</small>. student-<small>DAT.SG</small>. say-<small>EXP-AG-PAST.3SG.IND</small>.
eng: «Read the sentence once again» told the teacher caringly to the student.

dun: raṅgrī tahindūvai yāṅga emibe katat henda — āvet äre idumat nayūvi.
mor: raṅgr-ī tahind-∅-ū-ai yāṅg-∅-∅-a emibe kata-t hend-∅-∅-a āvet äre idum-at ne-∅-ū-i
gloss: truth-<small>ESS.SG</small>. listen-<small>EXP-AG-IMPF.3.SUBJ</small>. know_how_to-<small>EXP-PAT-PRES.3SG.IND</small>. one.<small>DIR.SG</small>. <small>2SG-ACC</small> hear-<small>EXP-PAT-PRES.3SG.IND</small>. then.<small>DIST</small>. even. nothing-<small>ACC</small>.say-<small>EXP-AG-PRES.2SG.IND</small>.
eng: One who really knows how to listen hears you, even when you don't say anything.

dun: kaunū: kata ṣṭṛmyāhai prādruṭai ba taili emibe iduvet prādruṭiṣya.
mor: kaun-∅-ū-∅ kata ṣṭṛ-∅-mi-āhai prādruṭ-ai ba taili emibe iduvet prādruṭ-iṣy-∅-∅-a
eng: Remember: many of the things you worry about are never going to happen.
I feel relieved that you comforted me. — Thanks for staying with me/being by my side.
I feel welcome/invited/accepted that you listened to me. — Thanks for your attention.
I feel flanked/supported that you did it instead of me [Nimālśi]. — Thanks for doing that / for taking care of that / for relieving my mental load.

dun: hunu fähla tati inīyūvāt ṣubha ṣṭrah.
mor: hunu fähl-∅-∅-a tati inī-∅-ū-āt ṣubha ṣṭṛ-∅-∅-ah
eng: I feel less worried/I worry less because you said I was right. — Thanks for [helping me and] saying it was right / for agreeing with me.

dun: kim̃ove yaiva yunai vartevu. saṃlīyuṅgevu saṃlīyuṅgevu yunaih emibe lila thuccyūvūvai gāśudove didya, śudābgevu mīrammekṣūvevu va trī mämän lila mekṣa. yaiva yunai hinū vartevu yaiva yunai hinak vaimyavevuṅ.
mor: kim̃-∅-∅-ove yaiva yun-ai vart-∅-∅-evu saṃlīyuṅg-∅-∅-evu saṃlīyuṅg-∅-∅-evu yun-aih emibe lila thuccyū-∅-ū-ai gāśud-∅-∅-ove didya śud-āp-∅-g-∅-evu mīrammeś-∅-g-ū-evu=va trī mämän lila meś-∅-g-∅-a. yaiva yun-ai hin-ū vart-∅-∅-evu yaiva yun-ai hin-ak vaimyo-∅-∅-evu=ṅ
gloss: choose-<small>EXP-PAT-IMPF.1PL.SUBJ</small>. all.<small>DIR</small>. <small>1PL.NOM</small>. need-<small>EXP-PAT-PRES.1PL.IND</small>. – be_thus_born-<small>EXP-PAT-PRES.1PL.IND</small>. be_thus_born-<small>EXP-PAT-PRES.1PL.IND</small>. <small>1PL-ACC</small>. one.<small>DIR.SG</small>. person.<small>DIR.SG</small>. accept_someone-<small>EXP-AG-IMPF.3.SUBJ</small>. be_aware-<small>EXP-PAT-IMPF.1PL.SUBJ</small>. more. know-<small>SITU-EXP-IRR-PAT-IMPF.1PL</small>. look_elsewhere-<small>EXP-IRR-AG-PRES.1PL.IND=NEG</small>. else. better. person.<small>DIR.SG</small>. see-<small>EXP-IRR-PAT-PRES.3SG.IND</small>. – all.<small>DIR</small>. <small>1PL.NOM</small>. <small>PROX.ABL</small>. need-<small>EXP-PAT-PRES.1PL.IND</small>. all.<small>DIR</small>. <small>1PL.NOM</small>. <small>PROX.DAT</small>. deserve-<small>EXP-PAT-PRES.1PL.IND=</small>and.
eng: We all need to be chosen. To be aware that someone accepts us just as we are, even if we know that, by just looking elsewhere, there's someone better. We all need it and we all deserve it.
